answers: Subscription model: recurring revenue, predictable income. Netflix, Spotify, SaaS companies use this.

feelings.answer: To cancel your subscription, follow the best practices mentioned in the text. This will help you understand how to terminate a subscription as well as what information to provide when requesting cancellation.
